Home / Service Areas / Jacksonville

Power-washing in Jacksonville, FL

Trusted local professionals serving Jacksonville and surrounding communities

Serving Jacksonville, FL

As Jacksonville's premier power-washing service, Summit Power Washing caters to both residential and commercial properties across the city. Jacksonville's mix of modern and historic buildings demands expert care, and our high-pressure and soft-wash techniques are ideal for all surfaces, from vinyl siding to concrete driveways. The coastal humidity accelerates mold and algae growth, but our proven methods ensure long-lasting results. Whether you're preparing for a sale or maintaining your property, we deliver top-quality service with attention to detail.

Jacksonville's diverse architecture and coastal climate make power washing essential for property upkeep.

Power-washing Services in Jacksonville

Residential Power Washing

Revitalize your Jacksonville home’s exterior with our tailored pressure-washing solutions.

Learn more →

Roof Cleaning

Gentle yet effective roof cleaning to combat Jacksonville’s relentless algae growth.

Learn more →

Driveway & Pavement Cleaning

Transform oil-stained driveways and mossy walkways into pristine surfaces.

Learn more →

Deck & Fence Restoration

Bring life back to weather-beaten outdoor living spaces.

Learn more →

Gutter Cleaning & Exterior Prep

Prevent water damage with debris-free gutters and clean exterior surfaces.

Learn more →

Contact us today for a free estimate. We provide professional, reliable service throughout Jacksonville and the surrounding area.
